x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Exposes the NYPD's flattened Open Data snapshots and the app-trapped operational record (CompStat 2.0, Officer Profile) behind one agent contract, and adds a net-new records/FOIL request workflow.

server.name: io.nyc.nypd
server.title: NYPD
server.description: Agent-native access to the New York City Police Department — reported complaints, arrests, shooting incidents, patrol precincts (with neighborhood coordination officers), and officer profiles with disciplinary history. Exposes the NYPD's flattened Open Data snapshots and the operational record trapped inside the CompStat 2.0 and Officer Profile single-page apps behind one owned surface; adds police-report / FOIL request submission.
server.instructions: Use find_complaints / get_complaint for reported incidents, find_arrests for arrests, and find_shooting_incidents for shootings — all filterable by borough, precinct, offense, and date range. find_precincts / get_precinct answer 'which precinct covers this area and who are its neighborhood coordination officers?'. find_officers / get_officer front the nypdonline.org Officer Profile transparency app (rank, command, arrests, disciplinary history). request_police_report (net-new) requires an authenticated user and mutates state — confirm details with the user before submitting. Crime data are periodic snapshots; do not treat counts as real-time.

tools.name: find_complaints
tools.title: Find Complaints
tools.description: Search reported criminal complaints (incidents) by borough, precinct, offense, offense level, date range, or free text. Fronts NYPD Complaint Data (Historic + Current YTD).

tools.name: get_complaint
tools.title: Get Complaint
tools.description: Fetch a single reported complaint by its complaint number (CMPLNT_NUM).

tools.name: find_arrests
tools.title: Find Arrests
tools.description: Search arrests by precinct, offense, offense level, and date range. Fronts NYPD Arrest Data (Historic + YTD).

tools.name: find_shooting_incidents
tools.title: Find Shooting Incidents
tools.description: Search NYPD shooting incidents by borough, precinct, murder flag, and date range. Fronts the NYPD Shooting Incident Data.

tools.name: find_precincts
tools.title: Find Precincts
tools.description: List NYPD patrol precincts, optionally by borough.

tools.name: get_precinct
tools.title: Get Precinct
tools.description: Get a precinct (1-123) with its sectors and neighborhood coordination officers (NCOs).

tools.name: find_officers
tools.title: Find Officers
tools.description: Search NYPD officer profiles by name, command, or rank. Fronts the nypdonline.org Officer Profile app (today a SPA with no public API).

tools.name: get_officer
tools.title: Get Officer
tools.description: Fetch an officer profile by profile id, including rank, command, arrests, and disciplinary history.

tools.name: request_police_report
tools.title: Request a Police Report / FOIL
tools.description: Request a copy of an NYPD record — an incident report, a collision/accident report, or a FOIL request. NET-NEW workflow with no equivalent API today. Requires an authenticated user. Mutates state — confirm details with the user first.
